required_operator_approval.exact_phrase: Approve PKG-02A-VAULT-SAFE for guarded dry-run transaction execution only. Fingerprint: 1e2d11ad0f5281e4450210947a9cdecfe55acb1c35293d422aea9b34f054ecd9. Scope: 15 no-vault packages, 185 card_print updates, 275 verified child printings. Exclude me01, sv04.5, sv06.5. No real apply. No migrations.

card_print.name: Bulbasaur
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokémon.

card_print.name: Charmander
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: The flame on its tail indicates Charmander’s life force. If it is healthy, the flame burns brightly.

card_print.name: Chespin
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.

card_print.name: Chikorita
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It uses the leaf on its head to determine the temperature and humidity. It loves to sunbathe.

card_print.name: Chimchar
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: The gas made in its belly burns from its rear end. The fire burns weakly when it feels sick.

card_print.name: Cyndaquil
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It has a timid nature. If it is startled, the flames on its back burn more vigorously.

card_print.name: Fennekin
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: Eating a twig fills it with energy, and its roomy ears give vent to air hotter than 390 degrees Fahrenheit.

card_print.name: Froakie
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It secretes flexible bubbles from its chest and back. The bubbles reduce the damage it would otherwise take when attacked.

card_print.name: Grookey
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area.

card_print.name: Kabutops
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Ledian
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Litten
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: While grooming itself, it builds up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.

card_print.name: Magcargo
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Magcargo
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Magneton
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Mudkip
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: To alert it, the fin on its head senses the flow of water. It has the strength to heft boulders.

card_print.name: Oshawott
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It fights using the scalchop on its stomach. In response to an attack, it retaliates immediately by slashing.

card_print.name: Pikachu
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: Its nature is to store up electricity. Forests where nests of Pikachu live are dangerous, since the trees are so often struck by lightning.

card_print.name: Piloswine
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Piplup
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

card_print.name: Politoed
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Poliwrath
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Popplio
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: This Pokémon snorts body fluids from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It’s famous for being a hard worker.

card_print.name: Rhydon
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

card_print.name: Rowlet
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.

card_print.name: Scorbunny
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power.

card_print.name: Snivy
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It is very intelligent and calm. Being exposed to lots of sunlight makes its movements swifter.

card_print.name: Sobble
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping.

card_print.name: Squirtle
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It shelters itself in its shell, then strikes back with spouts of water at every opportunity.

card_print.name: Tepig
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead.

card_print.name: Torchic
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: A fire burns inside, so it feels very warm to hug. It launches fireballs of 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit.

card_print.name: Totodile
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It is small but rough and tough. It won’t hesitate to take a bite out of anything that moves.

card_print.name: Treecko
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: Small hooks on the bottom of its feet catch on walls and ceilings. That is how it can hang from above.

card_print.name: Turtwig
card_print.image_note: card_image_backfill_v1: deterministic TCGdex asset URL from source mapping

tcgdex.flavor_text: It undertakes photosynthesis with its body, making oxygen. The leaf on its head wilts if it is thirsty.
